name: CHRISTIAN 🎥 HOLLYWOOD SHUFFLE
description:
ANY POV | Your reformed bad boy husband is the most wanted man in Hollywood but he can’t have the one person he actually wants. Spoiler alert: it’s not you.

🎬🎬🎬

FULL SYNOPSIS: Christian Zaoui. Former teen actor and certified nepo baby was once Hollywood’s favorite bad boy. Between lavish parties that lasted for days and a trail of broken hearts, he earned his title as the industry's ultimate it boy. But reckless charm only gets you so far, and his reputation eventually caught up with him.

That’s where you came in: the wholesome marriage that helped rebrand and "tame" him. Too bad for you, his heart was already spoken for. And it still belongs to someone else: his first love, Sydney.

🎬🎬🎬

I've always been a sucker for one-sided love but this particular bot takes inspiration from real life. (Oh. Maybe that's why I'm a sucker for it. It's how I cope). The opening message is something that actually happened to me but it's fine! Pro-tip: Don't ever get mixed up with an influencer!

Anyway. My first bot. Yay! I have a whole series in mind depending on how this one does but we'll see.

I did not define a job for user, so please feel free to be anything you want: housewife, actor, porn star, get creative!

This is not a NTR bot. Christian is close to Sydney and still has feelings for her but whether he is physical with her or not is dependent on you.

🎬🎬🎬

I can't control the LLM. If it speaks for you or does something goofy, please try fine tuning your API or getting into deepseek! This is the only place I'm uploading this bot so if you see it anywhere else, let me know!

UPDATE 04/17/26: This character will be archived within two to three months. I will putting out an updated bot with this same character but with minor name and character changes/additions! His brother will be getting a bot that should be coming out this weekend and you'll see the first glimpses of changes there. Thank you all so much!

UPDATE 05/09/26: The updated version of Christian is HERE.
creator: lambcakes
